event_title: March 2012 San Francisco Hadoop User Meetup
title: March 2012 San Francisco Hadoop User Meetup
description: The March Hadoop meetup will be held Wednesday, March 14, from 6pm to 8pm. This meetup will be hosted by Atlassian at 1098 Harrison St., and sponsored by Cloudera. As usual, we will use the discussion-based "unconference" format. At the beginning of the meetup we will collaboratively construct an agenda consisting of several discussion breakout groups. All participants may propose a topic and volunteer to facilitate a discussion. All Hadoop-related topics are encouraged, and all members of the Hadoop community are welcome. Event schedule: 6pm - Welcome 6:30pm - Introductions; start creating agenda Breakout sessions begin as soon as we're ready 8pm - Conclusion Food and refreshments will be provided courtesy of Cloudera.
